targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('second', s.recorded_at) AS time, CASE WHEN s.error IS NOT NULL THEN -50.0 ELSE s.latency_ms END AS value, e.name AS metric FROM ping_samples s JOIN endpoints e ON e.id = s.endpoint_id WHERE $__timeFilter(s.recorded_at) ORDER BY 1, e.sort_order, e.name

SELECT DISTINCT ON (e.id) e.name AS endpoint, s.latency_ms AS latency_ms, s.recorded_at AS time FROM endpoints e JOIN ping_samples s ON s.endpoint_id = e.id WHERE s.latency_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.id, s.recorded_at DESC

SELECT s.recorded_at AS time, e.name AS endpoint, s.error, s.status_code FROM ping_samples s JOIN endpoints e ON e.id=s.endpoint_id WHERE $__timeFilter(s.recorded_at) AND (s.error IS NOT NULL OR s.status_code >= 400) ORDER BY s.recorded_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Endpoint overview: latest probe, latency, and failures
panels.description: Latest probe details plus selected-range latency statistics. HTTP 5xx responses and transport/ICMP failures count as failures; HTTP 4xx responses remain reachable measurements.

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.name AS endpoint, e.probe_type AS probe_type, CASE WHEN latest.id IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN latest.error IS NOT NULL THEN 'Down' WHEN latest.status_code >= 500 THEN 'Server error' WHEN latest.status_code >= 400 THEN 'HTTP response' ELSE 'Healthy' END AS health, latest.latency_ms AS latest_latency_ms, latest.status_code, latest.recorded_at AS last_ping, latest.error, range.successful_samples, range.min_ms, range.avg_ms, range.max_ms, range.failures FROM endpoints e LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT * FROM ping_samples WHERE endpoint_id=e.id ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1) latest ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT count(id) FILTER (WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL) AS successful_samples, round(min(latency_ms)::numeric, 2) AS min_ms, round(avg(latency_ms)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ms, round(max(latency_ms)::numeric, 2) AS max_ms, count(id) FILTER (WHERE error IS NOT NULL OR status_code >= 500) AS failures FROM ping_samples WHERE endpoint_id=e.id AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)) range ON TRUE ORDER BY e.sort_order, e.name
